parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant "executor:AnalysisExecutor" as executor
participant ":Analysis" as Analysis
participant ":CountryCaseAPIGetter" as CountryCaseAPIGetter
participant ":CountryDeathAPIGetter" as CountryDeathAPIGetter
participant ":CountryPopulationAPIGetter" as CountryPopulationAPIGetter
participant ":APIInformationGetter" as APIInformationGetter
actor "Covid API" as CovidAPI

User -> executor : runAnalysis()
activate executor

opt At least one country selected for analysis
    executor -> Analysis : analyze()
    activate Analysis

    alt CasesPerCapitaAnalysis
        par
            Analysis -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getCases()
            activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
            CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getDataURL()
            activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
            CountryCaseAPIGetter --> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
            deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter
            CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CountryCaseAPIGetter --> Analysis : Cases in target Countries
            deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter

            Analysis -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getPopulation()
            activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getDataURL()
            activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter --> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
            deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter --> Analysis : Population of target Countries
            deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
        end

    else TotalCaseAnalysis
        Analysis -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getCases()
        activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
        CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getDataURL()
        activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
        CountryCaseAPIGetter --> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
        deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter
        CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
        activate CovidAPI
        CovidAPI --> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Information
        deactivate CovidAPI
        CountryCaseAPIGetter --> Analysis : Cases in target Countries
        deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter

    else MajorityCaseSexPerCapitaAnalysis
        par
            Analysis -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getMaleCases()
            activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
            CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getDataURL()
            activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
            CountryCaseAPIGetter --> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
            deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter
            CountryCaseAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CountryCaseAPIGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CountryCaseAPIGetter --> Analysis : Male cases in target Countries
            deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter

            Analysis -> CountryCaseAPIGetter : getFemaleCases()
            activate CountryCaseAPIGetter
            note right of CountryCaseAPIGetter : A call to the endpoint has\nalready been made so\nanother is not necessary
            CountryCaseAPIGetter --> Analysis : Female cases in target Countries
            deactivate CountryCaseAPIGetter

            Analysis -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getMalePopulation()
            activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getDataURL()
            activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter --> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
            deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter --> Analysis : Male population in target Countries
            deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter

            Analysis -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getFemalePopulation()
            activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            note right of CountryPopulationAPIGetter : A call to the endpoint has\nalready been made so\nanother is not necessary
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter --> Analysis : Female population in target Countries
            deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
        end

    else DeathsPerCapitaAnalysis
        par
            Analysis -> CountryDeathAPIGetter : getDeaths()
            activate CountryDeathAPIGetter
            CountryDeathAPIGetter -> CountryDeathAPIGetter : getDataURL()
            activate CountryDeathAPIGetter
            CountryDeathAPIGetter --> CountryDeathAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
            deactivate CountryDeathAPIGetter
            CountryDeathAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CountryDeathAPIGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CountryDeathAPIGetter --> Analysis : Deaths in target Countries
            deactivate CountryDeathAPIGetter

            Analysis -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getPopulation()
            activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : getDataURL()
            activate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter --> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Endpoint URL
            deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter -> CovidAPI : API Call
            activate CovidAPI
            CovidAPI --> CountryPopulationAPIGetter : API Information
            deactivate CovidAPI
            CountryPopulationAPIGetter --> Analysis : Population of target Countries
            deactivate CountryPopulationAPIGetter
        end
    end

    Analysis --> executor : Analysis Result
    deactivate Analysis
end

executor --> User : Finish (void)
deactivate executor
note left of executor : Per country analysis results\nare stored for later rendering

@enduml
```
